name: Jimmy Gomez
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $3,399,391 for Jimmy Gomez in U.S. House, CA-34. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
